function.name: fibonacci
function.long_description: Returns the nth number in the Fibonacci sequence (0-indexed), where each number is the sum of the previous two.
example_user_queries: What is the Fibonacci value at position 8?
Find the 20th term in the Fibonacci sequence.
Show me the Fibonacci result when n is 12.
Calculate the Fibonacci term at position 25.
Evaluate fibonacci with n equal to 18.
